mapper.sql: co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON , co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON , co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON , co.LEARNING_MODEL_ID , co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_PRB_CON , co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_PRB_CON , co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_PRB_CON , co.no as outputNo , ci.*
mapper.update: UPDATE CARD_OUTPUT co INNER JOIN CARD_LEARNING_DATA cld ON co.TSTM_YMD = cld.TSTM_YMD AND co.TSTM_NO = cld.TSTM_NO AND co.BRCD = cld.BRCD SET co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN = CASE WHEN INSTR(co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON, cld.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END, co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN = CASE WHEN INSTR(co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON, CONCAT(cld.BRCD, '-', cld.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON)) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END, co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN = CASE WHEN INSTR(co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON, TRIM(cld.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON)) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END WHERE co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN IS NULL OR co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN IS NULL OR co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON_HIT_YN IS NULL
